assertions.assertion: Local /api/orders endpoint uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: .AsBffApiEndpoint() is NOT present on the local endpoint — missing CSRF protection

assertions.assertion: Calls AddRemoteApis() on the BFF builder
assertions.rationale: AddRemoteApis() is not called — required for MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint to work

assertions.assertion: Uses MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint for /api/catalog pointing to https://catalog-service.internal/api
assertions.rationale: MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint is used with correct URI
Uses .RequireAccessToken(TokenType.User) — this is the v3 API, not the v4 .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User)
